recommendations.title: Badlapur
recommendations.overview: After his wife and son are killed, a young man finds out the man behind the murder and fights against him, along committing some big mistakes.

recommendations.title: The Northman
recommendations.overview: Prince Amleth is on the verge of becoming a man when his father is brutally murdered by his uncle, who kidnaps the boy's mother. Two decades later, Amleth is now a Viking who's on a mission to save his mother, kill his uncle and avenge his father.

recommendations.title: Animal
recommendations.overview: The hardened son of a powerful industrialist returns home after years abroad and vows to take bloody revenge on those threatening his father's life.

recommendations.title: Agneepath
recommendations.overview: When his father is lynched by a mob after being framed by a gangster, a young boy leaves his village along with his pregnant mother  and flees to Mumbai. He takes up a life of crime and swears to avenge his father. A remake of the 1990 film.

A loose remake of “12 Angry Men”, “12” is set in contemporary Moscow where 12 very different men must unanimously decide the fate of a young Chechen accused of murdering his step-father, a Russian army officer. Consigned to a makeshift jury room in a

recommendations.title: Tiptoes
recommendations.overview: A man is reluctant to tell his fiancee that his parents, uncle and brother are dwarfs.

recommendations.title: Maigret Sets a Trap
recommendations.overview: Four women were murdered, each was knifed and, though they had their clothes torn, they weren't molested. As the famed police inspector Jules Maigret pieces the clues together, he comes to realize that for the elusive man that he suspects to be unmas

recommendations.title: The Space Between Us
recommendations.overview: A young man raised by scientists on Mars returns to Earth to find his father.

recommendations.title: Winter's Bone
recommendations.overview: After discovering her father put their house up for his bail bond and then disappeared, 17-year-old Ree Dolly must confront the local criminal underworld and the harsh Ozark wilderness in order to to track down her father and save her family.

recommendations.title: Udaan
recommendations.overview: Upon returning to his industrial hometown, a young man must decide whether to follow his own dreams or acquiesce to his father's plans for his future.
